title: Imprint & Privacy Policy
subtitle: Information about the provider, disclaimer, and the processing of personal data.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
body: The content of this application has been created with the greatest care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, and timeliness of the content.

As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content. Obligations to remove or block the use of information under general laws remain unaffected. However, liability in this regard is only possible from the point in time at which a specific infringement becomes known. Upon becoming aware of any such infringements, we will remove this content immediately.

This application may contain links to external third-party websites, over whose content we have no influence. We cannot assume any liability for this third-party content. The respective provider or operator of the linked pages is always responsible for their content.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: We take the protection of your personal data seriously. Below, we inform you about the processing of personal data when using this application.

sections.title: Data controller
body: The provider named in the imprint is responsible for data processing.
If you have questions about data protection, you can contact us at the email address provided.

sections.title: Collection and use of data
body: This application can generally be used without providing personal data.
Where personal data (e.g. email address) is collected, this is done, where possible, always on a voluntary basis and only to process your request.

sections.title: Log data
body: When accessing this application, technical data (e.g. IP address, time of access, browser used) may be automatically transmitted by your browser. This information is used exclusively to ensure technical operation.

sections.title: Disclosure of data
body: Your personal data will only be transmitted to third parties if this is legally permitted or you have given your consent.

sections.title: Your rights
body: You have the right to information about the data stored about you, as well as the right to correction, deletion, or restriction of the processing of this data.
Please contact the email address provided in the imprint for this.
